content:
# Water Breakthrough

**Summary**: The point at which water reaches the wellbore from an underlying aquifer.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-kandil|Kandil, 1993]] analyzed water-breakthrough to determine production limits.

## Scientific Context

- [[1993-kandil|Kandil, 1993]] Critical for determining the economic life of a well.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1993-kandil|Kandil, 1993]] Monitoring of water cut over time.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Horizontal wells with longer lengths and fractures delay water breakthrough compared to vertical wells. ([[1993-kandil|Kandil, 1993, p. 46]])
